headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Danaher, Lowers Price Target to $250
summary: UBS  analyst Dan Leonard   maintains Danaher (NYSE:DHR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $270 to $250.

headline: Danaher shares are trading lower after Guggenheim and Wells Fargo lowered their respective price targets on the stock.
Danaher Q1 2026 Earnings Update
summary: Danaher had another somewhat uneventful quarter. Management kept their core revenue guidance of ~3-6% but raised the high end of 2026 EPS guidance. Read more here.

headline: DHR Q1 Deep Dive: Bioprocessing Momentum and Acquisition Strategy Drive Mixed Start to 2026
summary: Diversified science and technology company Danaher (NYSE:DHR) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales rose 3.7% year on year to $5.95 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.06 per share was 6.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Danaher, Lowers Price Target to $212
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Brandon Couillard   maintains Danaher (NYSE:DHR) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $240 to $212.

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Danaher, Lowers Price Target to $235
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Subbu Nambi   maintains Danaher (NYSE:DHR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $275 to $235.
